results.description: Main advantages are faster repeat installs via local cache, smaller transfers through compression, deterministic version control, and robust scripting automation for reproducible skill management.

results.title: GitHub - plastic-labs/openclaw-honcho: Make your OpenClaw happy, give it Honcho · GitHub
results.description: # 1. Install the skill npx clawhub install honcho-setup # 2. Restart OpenClaw to pick up the new skill # 3. Install the plugin openclaw plugins install @honcho-ai/openclaw-honcho # 4. Restart the gateway openclaw gateway restart # 5.
